_style: Match the provided reference (inspiration/perfect-fantasy-rpg-...jpg) as EXACT style law: carved gold-and-dark-iron UI chrome, ornamentation density, bevels, rivets, near-black + warm-gold palette with restrained blue accents. Head-on orthographic flat game-UI asset.
_rules: Every asset is a single isolated component on a fully transparent background (no scene, no shadow, no text, no extra elements), centered, symmetric.

assets.name: panel-frame
assets.prompt: Using the provided reference image as the EXACT style guide, create a single isolated rectangular dark-fantasy game UI panel frame — BORDER ONLY (the entire middle COMPLETELY HOLLOW and fully transparent). This is heavy chrome, NOT a thin painting frame: a THICK, wide, weathered near-black DARK-IRON border with a chiselled stone/metal texture, deeply carved aged-GOLD filigree scrollwork inlaid along the band, a hard beveled molding, and a thin bright gold inner lip. At EACH of the four corners place a raised ornate gold boss set with a faceted glowing BLUE GEMSTONE. Path of Exile aesthetic: GRIM and desaturated — the iron is cold near-BLACK gunmetal grey (NOT warm brown or bronze), the gold inlay is muted/aged/tarnished (NOT bright shiny brass), high-contrast, restrained. Slightly weathered and scratched. Perfectly symmetric on all four sides. Head-on orthographic flat view. Fully transparent background, no scene, no shadow, no text, no extra elements, isolated, centered.

assets.name: button
assets.prompt: Using the provided reference image as the EXACT style guide, create a single isolated horizontal dark-fantasy game UI button plate: a beveled cold near-BLACK gunmetal-grey iron slab (chiselled stone/metal texture, NOT warm brown), framed by a thin aged/tarnished muted-GOLD rim with small ornate gold corner caps and a soft warm top highlight. Empty center for a label. Path of Exile aesthetic — grim, metallic, high-contrast, restrained. Head-on orthographic flat view. Fully transparent background, no scene, no shadow, no text, no extra elements, isolated, centered.
